title: Where is "Board discussion" bubble?
excerpt: New user here.  I just watched part of the youtube video on new features from January 2024.  The first item up was “board discussions”, feature that is supposed to show up to the right of the board name.  We are on the s…

posts.author: Kurt (Kurt Harper)
posts.cookedHtml: New user here. I just watched part of the youtube video on new features from January 2024. The first item up was “board discussions”, feature that is supposed to show up to the right of the board name. We are on the standard plan, if that matters, but I don’t see the icon or bubble. do I need to do something special to invoke that feature?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Kurt,

The board discussion feature is currently being gradually released, with a completion date by the end of Q1. That said, I’ve reached out internally for a more concrete release date and you can follow along here → New feature in development: Board discussions! - #45 by V.B.Music
